mapper.select:
SELECT p.prodNo, p.prodName, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.hit, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pv_stock.stock), 0) FROM product_variant pv_stock WHERE pv_stock.prodNo = p.prodNo AND pv_stock.status != 'DELETED' ) AS stock, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, parent.name AS rootCategoryName, c.name AS subCategoryName, CASE WHEN c.code = 'UNCATEGORIZED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS uncategorized FROM product p LEFT JOIN product_variant pv ON pv.prodNo = p.prodNo AND pv.status != 'DELETED' LEFT JOIN category c ON c.cateId = p.cateId LEFT JOIN category parent ON parent.cateId = c.parentId
p.status = 'ON_SALE'
AND p.sellerUid = #{seller}
AND c.code = 'UNCATEGORIZED'
AND CAST(p.prodNo AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.prodName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM member m WHERE m.uid = p.sellerUid AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.prodName, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.hit, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, parent.name, c.name, c.code ORDER BY p.prodNo DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(prodNo) FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON c.cateId = p.cateId
p.status = 'ON_SALE'
AND sellerUid = #{seller}
AND c.code = 'UNCATEGORIZED'
AND CAST(p.prodNo AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.prodName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM member m WHERE m.uid = p.sellerUid AND m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

SELECT p.prodNo AS no, p.prodName AS name, p.description, p.price, p.discount, p.deliveryFee, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, m.name AS seller, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS rating FROM product p JOIN member m ON m.uid = p.sellerUid LEFT JOIN review r ON r.prodNo = p.prodNo
p.status = 'ON_SALE' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_variant pv_status WHERE pv_status.prodNo = p.prodNo AND pv_status.status = 'ON_SALE' )
AND p.cateId = #{cateId}
GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.prodName, p.description, p.price, p.discount, p.deliveryFee, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, m.name
ORDER BY ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.count), 0) FROM order_item oi JOIN product_variant pv_sales ON pv_sales.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = oi.orderNo WHERE pv_sales.prodNo = p.prodNo AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') ) DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY (p.price * (100 - p.discount) / 100) ASC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY (p.price * (100 - p.discount) / 100) DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY rating DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY COUNT(r.reviewNo) DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.prodNo DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

sql.where:
p.status = 'ON_SALE' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_variant pv_status WHERE pv_status.prodNo = p.prodNo AND pv_status.status = 'ON_SALE' )
AND
OR p.prodName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( p.prodName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND (p.price * (100 - p.discount) / 100) >= #{minPrice}
AND (p.price * (100 - p.discount) / 100) <= #{maxPrice}

mapper.select:
SELECT p.prodNo AS no, p.prodName AS name, p.description, p.price, p.discount, p.deliveryFee, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, m.name AS seller, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS rating FROM product p JOIN member m ON m.uid = p.sellerUid LEFT JOIN review r ON r.prodNo = p.prodNo
GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.prodName, p.description, p.price, p.discount, p.deliveryFee, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, m.name
ORDER BY ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(oi.count), 0) FROM order_item oi JOIN product_variant pv_sales ON pv_sales.id = oi.prodVariantId JOIN `order` o ON o.orderNo = oi.orderNo WHERE pv_sales.prodNo = p.prodNo AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELLED', 'REFUNDED') ) DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY (p.price * (100 - p.discount) / 100) ASC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY (p.price * (100 - p.discount) / 100) DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY rating DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY COUNT(r.reviewNo) DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.prodNo DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.prodNo AS no, p.prodName AS name, p.description, p.price, p.discount, p.deliveryFee, p.thumb1FileId, p.sellerUid, m.name AS seller, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS rating FROM product p JOIN member m ON m.uid = p.sellerUid LEFT JOIN review r ON r.prodNo = p.prodNo WHERE p.status = 'ON_SALE' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_variant pv_status WHERE pv_status.prodNo = p.prodNo AND pv_status.status = 'ON_SALE' ) GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.prodName, p.description, p.price, p.discount, p.deliveryFee, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.sellerUid, m.name, p.hit, p.createdAt
ORDER BY p.hit DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.discount DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.createdAt DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY rating DESC, p.prodNo DESC
ORDER BY p.prodNo DESC
LIMIT #{size}

SELECT p.prodNo, p.cateId, p.prodName, p.description, p.maker, p.deliveryFee, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.taxType, p.receiptIssueType, p.businessType, p.brand, p.origin, p.hit, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pv_stock.stock), 0) FROM product_variant pv_stock WHERE pv_stock.prodNo = p.prodNo AND pv_stock.status != 'DELETED' ) AS stock, parent.cateId AS rootCategoryId, parent.name AS rootCategoryName, c.name AS subCategoryName, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.thumb3FileId, p.detailInfoFileId, p.sellerUid, m.name AS seller, COALESCE(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS rating, COUNT(DISTINCT r.reviewNo) AS reviewCount, p.infoNoticeType, p.status, p.createdAt FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON c.cateId = p.cateId LEFT JOIN category parent ON parent.cateId = c.parentId LEFT JOIN member m ON m.uid = p.sellerUid LEFT JOIN review r ON r.prodNo = p.prodNo WHERE p.prodNo = #{prodNo} GROUP BY p.prodNo, p.cateId, p.prodName, p.description, p.maker, p.deliveryFee, p.price, p.discount, p.point, p.taxType, p.receiptIssueType, p.businessType, p.brand, p.origin, p.hit, parent.cateId, parent.name, c.name, p.thumb1FileId, p.thumb2FileId, p.thumb3FileId, p.detailInfoFileId, p.sellerUid, m.name, p.infoNoticeType, p.status, p.createdAt
